# render-diff

Diff renderer for the structure facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's structure to one entry per anomaly
(non-standard folder, loose top-level source file, or composition root) via
`structureToComparable` in the facet `core/`, so the host can diff a plugin's
structural anomalies between the worktree and main. Standard folders are
conformant and excluded from the comparable set.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the structure facet (PR review).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChangesSlots.DiffRenderer` "Structure"
  - Uses: `review/plugin-changes.PluginChangesSlots`
